changelog:
Version 2.3.0 - Top-Down Vehicles & Full PDF Export

✅ TOP-DOWN REALISTIC VEHICLES:
• Sedan: Hood, windshield, roof, rear window, trunk (blue)
• Pickup: Detailed cab with windshield, separate bed (red)
• 18-Wheeler: Cab with windshield, long trailer, 6 wheels (orange)
• Motorcycle: Handlebars, narrow body, 2 wheels (gray)
• All vehicles drawn from bird's-eye view
• Proper colors and details

✅ COMPLETE PDF EXPORT:
• Captures ACTUAL diagram from canvas
• Uses PIL to render all objects
• Professional layout with title and metadata
• Scales diagram to fit page
• Centers diagram on page
• High-quality rendering

✅ ALL PREVIOUS FEATURES:
• Working scrollbar
• No emojis on buttons
• Maximized canvas
• Auto-update system
• Collapsible sections
